videos.headline: Western Kentucky tops Sam Houston
videos.description: Maverick McIvor throws three touchdowns to lead WKU to a commanding win over Sam Houston 41-24.

videos.headline: Hunter Watson rushes in for 55-yard rushing touchdown
videos.description: Hunter Watson takes it 55 yards on the ground to give WKU an early score against Sam Houston.
